data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Due-date reminders', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or checks related to due-date reminders being sent or managed within the system. The absence of this critical functionality indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as there are no records or actions that demonstrate the existence or operation of due-date reminders.
gaps: No evidence of due-date reminders being implemented or triggered.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
